title: Online Course Presentation with Split Screen
description: Professional online course video featuring instructor and content side-by-side

prompt.main: Create a professional online education video with split-screen layout. Left side shows instructor in modern home office with ring light illumination, gesturing naturally while explaining concepts. Right side displays animated presentation slides with clean typography and smooth transitions between topics. Camera captures instructor at eye-level with shallow depth of field for professional look.

elements.cameraMovement: Static camera on instructor, gentle zoom-in during key points, animated transitions on presentation side
elements.subject: Professional instructor in business casual attire, expressive hand gestures, direct eye contact with camera
elements.scene: Modern home office with bookshelf background, minimal distractions, professional lighting setup
elements.motion: Natural speaking gestures, slide animations sync with speech, highlighting text appears as topics discussed
elements.lighting: Soft key light from ring light, subtle fill light to reduce shadows, warm 3200K color temperature
elements.atmosphere: Professional yet approachable, focused learning environment, engaging educational content
elements.style: Clean modern educational video production, high-quality webcam aesthetic with professional polish

modifiedElements.scene: Instructor fills entire frame, slides appear as overlay graphics
Instructor on green screen, virtual classroom background
modifiedElements.lighting: Even green screen lighting, no shadows on backdrop

bestPractices: Ensure clear audio quality with lapel or directional microphone
Maintain consistent eye contact with camera lens
Synchronize slide transitions with verbal cues
Use lower thirds for instructor name and course title

examples.sampleOutput: Professional online course segment with clear instruction

title: Hands-On Tutorial Demonstration
description: Close-up tutorial showing step-by-step process with multiple camera angles

prompt.main: Film a detailed hands-on tutorial with crystal-clear close-up shots. Overhead camera captures workspace from bird's eye view, showing hands performing precise actions. Secondary angle provides context shots. Smooth transitions between angles, with macro lens details for intricate steps. Bright, even lighting eliminates shadows on work surface.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth transitions between overhead and 45-degree angles, gentle push-ins for detail shots
elements.subject: Skilled hands demonstrating technique, tools and materials clearly visible
elements.scene: Clean, organized workspace with neutral background, all necessary tools within frame
elements.motion: Deliberate, measured movements, pausing at key steps, smooth tool handling
elements.lighting: Bright LED panel lighting from multiple angles, no harsh shadows, 5600K daylight balanced
elements.atmosphere: Focused, instructional, clear visibility of all actions
elements.style: Professional tutorial production with broadcast quality standards

modifiedElements.scene: Multiple angles shown simultaneously in split screen
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Static cameras, edited in post for multi-angle view

bestPractices: Use overhead rig or boom arm for stable overhead shots
Include brief tool/material overview at beginning
Add text overlays for measurements and key steps
Maintain consistent framing throughout demonstration

examples.sampleOutput: Clear, detailed tutorial video with multiple angles

title: Animated Educational Explainer
description: Engaging animated educational content with dynamic infographics and motion graphics

prompt.main: Create vibrant educational animation with smooth motion graphics. Colorful flat design elements animate in sequence, building complex concepts step-by-step. Icons and illustrations move with purpose, guided by invisible physics. Text appears with satisfying ease curves. Background subtly shifts through complementary color gradients.

elements.cameraMovement: Virtual camera pans and zooms following animation flow, smooth parallax effects
elements.subject: Animated icons, charts, diagrams, and text elements in cohesive visual style
elements.scene: Clean gradient or geometric pattern background, ample negative space
elements.motion: Bouncy animations with overshoot, elements slide and scale with purpose
elements.lighting: Flat design with subtle shadows for depth, bright saturated colors
elements.style: Contemporary motion graphics with Google Material or Apple design influence

modifiedElements.style: Ultra-minimal with line art and limited color palette

bestPractices: Maintain consistent animation timing and easing
Use color coding for related concepts
Include subtle sound design for each animation
Ensure text remains on screen long enough to read

title: Interactive Whiteboard Session
description: Dynamic whiteboard teaching session with real-time drawing and annotations

prompt.main: Film engaging whiteboard teaching session with instructor drawing and explaining concepts in real-time. Camera captures both instructor and board, with smooth focus pulls between speaker and content. Hand movements are fluid and purposeful, creating diagrams and text with confidence. Multiple colored markers used for emphasis and organization.

elements.cameraMovement: Gentle pans following instructor movement, focus pulls between face and board content
elements.subject: Enthusiastic instructor with clear handwriting, professional appearance
elements.scene: Modern classroom with large whiteboard, good acoustics, minimal background noise
elements.motion: Natural teaching movements, drawing diagrams, pointing to key concepts
elements.lighting: Even classroom lighting, no glare on whiteboard, instructor well-lit
elements.atmosphere: Engaging classroom environment, dynamic teaching energy
elements.style: Professional educational video with broadcast quality

modifiedElements.scene: Interactive digital display with touch controls
modifiedElements.motion: Finger gestures for drawing and manipulation

modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Tight shots on board content only
modifiedElements.subject: Just hands and markers visible

bestPractices: Use wireless microphone for clear audio
Pre-plan board layout for optimal use of space
Write large enough for camera to capture clearly
Use high-contrast markers for better visibility

title: Laboratory Experiment Documentation
description: Scientific experiment capture with multiple angles and detailed process documentation

prompt.main: Document laboratory experiment with cinematic precision. Multiple cameras capture procedure from various angles - wide shot for context, close-ups for detailed steps, overhead for workspace overview. Sterile environment with precise movements. Time-lapse segments show reactions or changes. Safety equipment prominently featured.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth dollies along lab bench, crane shots for overview, macro lenses for reactions
elements.subject: Scientist in full PPE performing precise experimental procedures
elements.scene: Professional laboratory setting with modern equipment, clean surfaces, organized workspace
elements.motion: Methodical movements, careful pipetting, precise measurements
elements.lighting: Bright, even laboratory lighting, additional spots for detailed work
elements.style: Documentary-style science videography with cinematic quality

bestPractices: Follow all safety protocols during filming
Use multiple cameras for comprehensive coverage
Include equipment close-ups and labels
Add post-production annotations for clarity

title: Screen Recording with Instructor Overlay
description: Software tutorial with screen capture and instructor picture-in-picture

prompt.main: Create engaging screen recording tutorial with instructor overlay in corner. Screen shows software interface with smooth cursor movements and highlighted click areas. Instructor appears in circular overlay, maintaining eye contact while explaining. Zoom effects emphasize important interface elements. Annotations and arrows appear to guide attention.

elements.cameraMovement: Digital zooms on screen areas, smooth pans following cursor movement
elements.subject: Computer screen with software interface, instructor in video overlay
elements.scene: Clean desktop environment, professional software interface, organized workspace
elements.motion: Purposeful cursor movements, click animations, smooth scrolling
elements.lighting: Well-lit instructor overlay, screen brightness optimized for recording
elements.style: Modern screencasting with high production value

modifiedElements.scene: Split screen with instructor on one side

bestPractices: Record at native screen resolution for clarity
Use keystroke visualizer for shortcuts
Add click sound effects and visual feedback
Maintain consistent cursor speed

title: Student Success Story Interview
description: Inspirational student testimonial with cinematic interview setup

prompt.main: Film compelling student testimonial with cinematic production value. Subject positioned using rule of thirds, speaking directly to off-camera interviewer. Shallow depth of field creates beautiful bokeh background. B-roll footage shows student in learning environment. Natural expressions and genuine emotions captured with multiple takes.

elements.cameraMovement: Subtle handheld movement for organic feel, slow push-ins during emotional moments
elements.subject: Student in comfortable setting, authentic expressions, professional yet approachable appearance
elements.scene: Aesthetically pleasing location - library, campus, or relevant learning environment
elements.motion: Natural conversational gestures, genuine reactions, comfortable body language
elements.lighting: Soft natural light from window, subtle fill light, warm color grading

modifiedElements.subject: Quick cuts between different student testimonials

modifiedElements.scene: Students engaged in learning activities while speaking

bestPractices: Use lavalier microphone for clear audio
Shoot multiple angles for editing options
Capture plenty of B-roll footage
Create comfortable environment for authentic responses

title: Virtual Workshop Environment
description: Immersive workshop setting with multiple participants and interactive elements

prompt.main: Create dynamic virtual workshop environment showing engaged participants in video conference grid. Main presenter shares screen with interactive content while participants react and contribute. Smooth transitions between speaker view and shared content. Chat messages and reactions appear as overlays. Professional home office setups visible in each participant window.

elements.cameraMovement: Digital transitions between grid view and speaker focus, zoom effects on active speakers
elements.subject: Multiple workshop participants in professional home settings, engaged and interactive
elements.scene: Video conference interface with clean backgrounds, good lighting for all participants
elements.motion: Natural gestures, typing, note-taking, head nods and reactions
elements.lighting: Well-lit faces for all participants, no backlit windows, professional appearance
elements.atmosphere: Collaborative, engaged, professional virtual learning environment
elements.style: Modern remote learning aesthetic with high production value

modifiedElements.scene: Mix of in-person and remote participants
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Cuts between physical room and screens

modifiedElements.subject: Small group discussions in separate virtual rooms

bestPractices: Ensure all participants have good audio quality
Use virtual backgrounds sparingly
Include interactive elements like polls or whiteboards
Show genuine engagement and participation

title: Educational Documentary Segment
description: High-production documentary-style educational content with expert interviews and visuals

prompt.main: Produce documentary-style educational segment with cinematic quality. Expert interviews intercut with relevant B-roll footage. Smooth camera movements reveal subjects and environments. Historical footage or animations illustrate complex concepts. Professional color grading creates cohesive visual narrative. Lower thirds identify speakers and key information.

elements.cameraMovement: Steadicam movements, drone shots for establishing scenes, slider moves for interviews
elements.subject: Subject matter experts, historical artifacts, relevant locations and demonstrations
elements.scene: Varied locations including offices, laboratories, historical sites, museums
elements.motion: Cinematic movements, slow reveals, matched action cuts between scenes
elements.lighting: Professional three-point lighting for interviews, natural light for B-roll

modifiedElements.style: Ken Burns effect on historical images

bestPractices: Scout locations for best visual impact
Use professional audio recording equipment
Color grade for consistent look across footage
Include variety of shot types and angles

title: Interactive Quiz Game Show
description: Engaging educational quiz format with game show elements and visual effects

prompt.main: Create exciting educational quiz show format with dynamic graphics and sound effects. Questions appear with animated text and countdown timers. Multiple choice options fly in with satisfying animations. Correct answers trigger celebration effects with particles and color bursts. Score counters and progress bars update in real-time. Host or narrator provides energetic commentary.

elements.cameraMovement: Quick cuts between questions, dynamic zooms on correct answers, energetic transitions
elements.subject: Animated quiz interface with questions, answers, timers, and score displays
elements.scene: Colorful game show inspired background with spotlights and geometric patterns
elements.motion: Fast-paced animations, pulsing elements, particle effects for celebrations
elements.lighting: Bright, colorful lighting effects, spotlights sweeping across scene
elements.style: Modern game show production with educational content

bestPractices: Keep text large and readable
Use contrasting colors for visibility
Add sound effects for each interaction
Maintain consistent timing for questions
